name: Bug report
about: Something in a tool is wrong or broken

**Tool**
Which tool? (e.g. India In-Hand Salary, Offer Letter)

**What you entered**
The inputs / field values you used.

**Expected vs actual**
What you expected to see, and what actually happened.

**Environment**
- OS: (macOS / Windows / Linux + version)
- hrToolkit version:

> The app is fully offline — no logs leave your machine, so please include the
> details above so we can reproduce it.
